essential_assertions.text: assert forall|m: int| 1 <= m <= l && divides(a as int, m) && divides(b as int, m) implies l <= m by { div_mod_lemma(b as int, m); }

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|m: int| 1 <= m <= l && divides(a as int, m) && divides(b as int, m) implies l <= m by { div_mod_lemma(b as int, m); }
